description: Tests serialisation of complex function types that use parameters from the standard library (e.g., syscall, context).

assertions.description: The 'Control' field's TypeString should correctly represent the function signature with the external 'syscall.RawConn' type.
assertions.expect: func(network string, address string, c syscall.RawConn) error

assertions.description: The 'Control' field should be a composite type of 'Signature'.
The composite part for the 'syscall.RawConn' parameter should have its PackagePath correctly set to 'syscall'.
The 'Handler' field's TypeString should correctly represent the named function type.
The underlying type for 'MethodHandler' should be the full function signature.
assertions.expect: func(srv any, ctx context.Context, dec func(any) error, c syscall.RawConn) (any, error)

assertions.description: The 'Test' function should have a return type of 'syscall.RawConn'.
The 'Test2' function should return a function type that includes 'syscall.RawConn'.
